story.text:
# 💡 C92 · Tarski ↔ Φ_inference
**concept** · mage · knowledge

Existence-leak is the Tarski-undefinability instance loading on Φ_inference: feasibility-truth escapes containment across systems and accumulates across observers; D(X) monotone non-increasing in corroborating systems. Absorbs the Gödelian seed (existence as positive provability). Rides on C81, cannot exceed its base. Active (70% · Run 8).

## Edges in

- [[C93 · Content-Addressed Liveness Leak]] *relates_to* →
- [[Privacy Value Model V6]] *references* →
